opus_correction: Post-mortem identified 3 critical pipeline regressions: finding_id NULL on 100% of trades (91 over 7 days breaking scout-to-trade attribution), indicator coverage regressed to 40% (3/5 trades missing bb_width/rsi/stoch_k snapshots), flight recorder DB completely empty. Failure attribution: 1 dead market loss (BB width below threshold), 1 weak conditions loss (insufficient condition coverage). GBP_JPY concentrated all losses (-0.8 pips). S16 strategy at 0% WR needs monitoring.
opus_reasoning: Step-by-step analysis: queried live_trades, computed per-pair and per-strategy metrics, cross-referenced with watch_suggestions for attribution, checked indicator snapshot coverage, verified flight recorder tables. The finding_id regression is the most critical issue — without it, no automated learning loop can connect scout predictions to trade outcomes.
